description: Every TicketData price signal for any event, performer, or venue, plus a local price-history store for trend math, drift alerts, and cross-event comparisons no ticket tool ships.

tools.name: events_get
tools.description: Get an event's current get-in price, forecast, N-day change, marketplace links, and venue/performer detail. Required: id.

tools.name: events_history
tools.description: Get the full get-in-price time series for an event (hundreds of points), plus per-zone series and on/presale dates. Required: id.

tools.name: events_sections
tools.description: List the section names catalogued for an event. Required: id. Returns array.

tools.name: performers_get
tools.description: Get a performer's stats (upcoming events, avg/min/max get-in price) and resale/social links. Required: slug.

tools.name: performers_search
tools.description: Resolve a search query to the best-matching performer. Required: query.

params.name: query
params.description: Performer name to search for (e.g. 'ariana grande')

tools.name: venues_get
tools.description: Get a venue's stats (upcoming events, location). Required: slug.

tools.name: venues_search
tools.description: Resolve a search query to the best-matching venue. Required: query.

params.name: query
params.description: Venue name to search for (e.g. 'state farm arena')
